title: Astra Vey — Prismatic Duelist
character_anchor: Astra Vey, premium anime heroine, same exact identity every generation: late-teen to young-adult female, elegant athletic build, silver-white hair with faint pink and violet gradient tint, long layered hair with a clean signature silhouette and face-framing side locks, sharp blue-violet eyes, refined small nose, soft pointed chin, calm confident expression, futuristic fantasy-tech duelist outfit with sleek fitted bodice, luminous trim, short layered mantle-panels, elegant gauntlets, thigh accents, heeled combat boots, premium heroic presence.
wardrobe_anchor: sleek futuristic combat fashion, elegant not bulky, white pearl and graphite base with violet-magenta-cyan luminous accents and restrained gold details, fantasy-tech paneling, polished premium materials, no heavy armor, no cape obscuring silhouette, no oversized weapons dominating frame.
face_anchor: same face every time, anime heroine with sharp blue-violet eyes, symmetrical refined features, youthful mature beauty, calm confident gaze, identical proportions, identical eye color, identical hairstyle silhouette, no facial markings, no eyewear.
pose_anchor: heroic premium collectible-card pose, body angled three-quarters toward camera, chest open, one leg forward, poised motion without extreme action distortion, one hand ready for energy summoning, elegant confident posture, full character visible.
camera_anchor: portrait-oriented screen card composition, medium-full to full-body framing, slightly low heroic camera, centered character priority, cinematic depth, clear silhouette separation for layered compositing.
palette_anchor: violet, magenta, cyan, gold, white with silver-white hair and blue-violet eyes, prismatic holographic highlights, luminous but controlled saturation.
lighting_anchor: cinematic premium key light on face, cool prismatic rim lights, soft holographic bloom, strong face readability, polished collectible-card contrast.

composition_anchor: designed as separate generation-safe layers: character identity locked, background separate, player separate, FX separated front/back, no baked UI, no text baked into art, no physical card frame, premium collectible depth and holographic energy.
